name: Fried Oysters#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the oysters and pat them dry on paper towels.
2. Make a batter by beating the eggs slightly and stirring in milk, salt, and pepper.
3. Dip each oyster into the batter, then coat with fine dry bread crumbs or cornmeal.
4. Heat butter in a single layer in a pan over medium heat. Fry the oysters until golden brown, turning occasionally.
5. Alternatively, fry the oysters in deep fat heated to 375 degrees Fahrenheit until golden brown.
6. Drain the fried oysters on paper towels.
7. Arrange the cooked oysters in a shallow baking pan in single layers.
8. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for about 15 minutes or until they are nicely browned.
